notes: Production runtime intentionally remains CC7.5.25 legacy layered loader.
AdminKit Core is still side-by-side and not active globally in production webhook routing.
Core buttons.home intentionally uses only clean storage table ak_post_buttons.
Legacy ak_comment_banners_v3 was identified diagnostically but is not a Core working adapter and is ignored by future architecture.
Old patched posts must not shape the new Core data model; new CTA/button creation will write to ak_post_buttons only.
All current Core button reads are SELECT-only; Core still does not create, update, delete, or bind buttons until the next migration step.
The Add/Manage buttons actions in Core remain informational only for this build.
Next migration step: implement Core create CTA flow that writes new buttons into ak_post_buttons and patches only newly selected posts through the clean Core pipeline.
